overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing a character in a white coat exploring the interior of a colonial spaceship. The character walks through industrial corridors with exposed piping, passes medical bays and seating areas, and ascends stairs toward a cargo bay entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical bay transitioning to industrial machinery room

events.description: character moves from medical bay into narrow industrial corridor
camera tilts upward to reveal large red machinery mounted on the ceiling
screen fades to black with title card overlay appearing

agents.ego_description: character walking through medical bay and corridor, examining the overhead machinery

entered.detail: rows of medical beds with white sheets in the initial room
medical equipment and monitors on the left wall
metal archway leading from the medical bay to the corridor
large red mechanical structure and rotating components mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a medical bay with beds and equipment visible on either side. They walk through a narrow metal corridor, and the camera tilts upward to examine large industrial machinery on the ceiling. The segment ends with the screen fading to black as a title card appears.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with passenger seating and exposed industrial piping

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily down the corridor past rows of passenger seats

entered.detail: rows of white and blue passenger seats lining the right wall
large industrial pipes and conduits running along the ceiling
metal storage containers and equipment racks on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a long industrial corridor lined with passenger seats on the right and storage containers on the left. Large overhead pipes run the length of the ceiling. The text 'ECS CONSTANT Colonial Space Ship' is overlaid on the screen as the character progresses toward a stairwell.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell and upper corridor leading to cargo bay

events.description: character begins ascending the metal staircase
character reaches top of stairs and enters upper corridor with cargo bay access

agents.ego_description: character climbs the metal stairs and proceeds toward the cargo bay entrance

entered.detail: metal grated stairs with railings leading upward to the next level
large circular airlock door with glass window at the end of the corridor
illuminated orange sign reading 'CARGO BAY' with directional arrow

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a metal staircase to an upper level, passing through a transitional stairwell. Upon reaching the top, they walk down a corridor toward a large circular airlock door marked 'CARGO BAY'. The door becomes progressively larger as the character approaches, ending the clip near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through the interior of a colonial spaceship, moving from a clinical medical area into the vast industrial scale of a cargo bay. It begins in a medical bay flanked by beds and equipment, progressing through a narrow metal corridor where the camera tilts upward to examine heavy ceiling machinery. As the character continues, the scene opens into a long industrial hallway lined with passenger seats and storage containers beneath a network of overhead pipes. The camera then follows the character as they ascend a metal staircase to an upper level, transitioning from the narrow halls to a wider corridor. Finally, the movement leads directly toward a massive circular airlock door marked Cargo Bay, which looms larger in the frame as the character reaches the entrance.
